originalTitle: Fixing Reinforcement Learning with PufferLib - Live Dev
title: Profiling and Optimizing P3O Overhead with GPU Indexing and CUDA Kernel
summary: Profiled performance bottlenecks in the P3O algorithm, moved indexing operations to GPU to reduce CPU overhead, and began writing a custom CUDA kernel for advantage computation. The changes narrowed the performance gap with PPO, achieving a 5% speed improvement.
